title: Fix topic expand behavior: do not auto-focus score result on expand

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Bugfix: topic expand currently triggers immediate item filtering/selection, preventing users from viewing expanded topic content. Decouple expand from filter; add explicit view-items action in expanded topic panel.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Implemented bugfix: topic expand no longer triggers score-result focus. Topic expansion is now purely expand/collapse, and filtering is explicit via 'View N items in score results' action inside expanded topic. Added optional clear-topic-filter action when active. Updated tests in topic-list + evaluation category filter; dashboard build passes.
